overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player walks under elevated highways, past sidewalk food vendors and an NCPD police station, crosses the street, and enters a megabuilding lobby with video screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass toward the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: massive teal-colored concrete support pillars for the elevated highway above
cluster of illuminated holographic and neon advertisements on distant buildings
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
ground-level commercial storefronts with glowing signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete overpass in a cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves forward past large teal support pillars toward a crosswalk, with neon signs visible in the distance and sparse pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with food vendors and NCPD police station

events.description: turns right from under the overpass onto the open sidewalk with food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking past sidewalk food vendors and groups of pedestrians near the NCPD station

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall with distinctive zebra-print counter decoration

entered.detail: street food vendor stall with zebra-print pattern on the counter and overhead canopy
police station building with blue NCPD signage and orange architectural elements
bright orange metal railings along the curb edge
large circular concrete planter with palm trees

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a busier sidewalk lined with a zebra-print food stall on the left and an NCPD police station on the right. Moderate crowds of pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and orange safety railings line the street edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with police presence and megabuilding entrance

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the street toward the megabuilding
NCPD police cruiser drives past on the left and stops near the curb

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching the megabuilding entrance while passing police vehicles

notable_agents.action: NCPD police cruiser with flashing lights driving past and stopping at the curb
police officer standing near the cruiser observing the street

entered.detail: black and white police car with NCPD markings and red emergency lights
large building entrance with MEGABUILDING H4 signage and metal security grille
vertical neon sign with KABAYAN text in red and yellow

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the asphalt street toward the Megabuilding H4 entrance, passing an NCPD police cruiser that pulls up on the left. Police officers stand near the vehicle as the player approaches the building's metal security gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: megabuilding lobby with video advertising screens

events.description: passes through the metal security gate into the megabuilding interior lobby

agents.ego_description: walking into the building lobby and approaching the elevator area while observing the video screens

entered.detail: wall of multiple flatscreen displays showing advertisements and news feeds
elevator bank area with closed metal doors and control panels
metal mesh security gate that opens to allow entry

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the megabuilding through a sliding metal security gate into a narrow lobby. The walls are covered with arrays of glowing video screens displaying advertisements, and the space is lit by artificial ceiling lights with elevator banks visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the cavernous shadows of a city overpass into the sterile, neon-lit interior of a massive residential complex. It begins by moving past teal concrete support pillars under a dark highway, heading toward a distant glow of neon signs and sparse pedestrians. As the camera turns right, the environment shifts to a bustling sidewalk characterized by a zebra-print food stall and the facade of an NCPD police station. The perspective then crosses the asphalt street, passing a police cruiser and officers before approaching a metal security gate. Finally, the camera glides through the sliding gate and into a narrow lobby, where the outdoor city lights are replaced by artificial ceiling illumination and walls of glowing advertisement screens.
